source_jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive - SF
source_jobs.description:
Outset invented a better way to do research: AI-powered user interviews.



Global brands like Hubspot, Microsoft, Uber and Nestle use Outset to achieve deeper, qualitative insights about their users at unprecedented speed and scale.


The research industry is massive (>$140B and growing) and ripe for disruption. Incumbents are outdated, slow, and burdened by high-cost services. That's our opportunity.


Outset is backed by top Silicon Valley investors and raised a $30M Series B in December 2025—less than six months after our Series A—led by Radical Ventures with participation from M12 (Microsoft’s venture arm), 8VC, Y Combinator, and Adverb Ventures.



The raise follows a breakout year, with our business growing 8x as enterprise customers across industries adopt our category, AI‑moderated research, as the new standard for understanding people.



We’re a tight-knit team serving some of the world’s largest enterprises



🤔 The Solution

We’ve created an end-to-end, AI-moderated research platform that conducts deep-dive interviews with participants to understand user experiences, evaluate concepts, and test designs. Our AI synthesizes conversational data, delivering precise, actionable insights.

Our customers complete hundreds of interviews in hours, dramatically accelerating research cycles and enabling unprecedented data scale. Outset leverages proprietary infrastructure built upon leading language and voice AI models.

We are customer-driven at our core.

👋 The Role

As an Enterprise Account Executive at Outset, you will:

 - Own the full sales cycle from prospecting and qualification through negotiation and close.

 - Build and maintain relationships with key enterprise stakeholders, including senior executives and decision-makers.

 - Clearly articulate and demonstrate the value proposition of Outset’s AI-powered research platform.

 - Collaborate closely with the founding team to refine sales processes, identify market opportunities, and drive strategic growth.

 - Exceed revenue goals by identifying, nurturing, and closing enterprise opportunities.

 - Work cross-functionally with product and customer success teams to ensure customer alignment and satisfaction.

💪 Skills/experience required:

 - Proven track record successfully selling complex SaaS solutions to enterprise accounts

 - Demonstrated success navigating enterprise sales cycles, managing negotiations, and closing significant deals.

 - Strong relationship-building skills with senior-level decision-makers and executives.

 - Excellent communication and presentation skills; ability to articulate complex products clearly.

 - Self-starter mentality, with the ability to thrive in a fast-paced startup environment.

 - Bonus: Experience selling SaaS products within similar or adjacent industries (research, analytics, AI).

NOTE: This role may involve travel up to 40% of the time.

Benefits

 - Daily collaboration with founders, shaping the core product vision.

 - Exposure to and collaboration with design and research leaders at top global brands.

 - Competitive cash and equity compensation. Actual compensation packages are based on various factors unique to each candidate, including skill set, depth of experience, and certifications.

Outset is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees, free from discrimination based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability, or any other protected class.

source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative - NYC
source_jobs.description:
Outset invented a better way to do research: AI-powered user interviews.



Global brands like Hubspot, Microsoft, Uber and Nestle use Outset to achieve deeper, qualitative insights about their users at unprecedented speed and scale.


The research industry is massive (>$140B and growing) and ripe for disruption. Incumbents are outdated, slow, and burdened by high-cost services. That's our opportunity.


Outset is backed by top Silicon Valley investors and raised a $30M Series B in December 2025—less than six months after our Series A—led by Radical Ventures with participation from M12 (Microsoft’s venture arm), 8VC, Y Combinator, and Adverb Ventures.



The raise follows a breakout year, with our business growing 8x as enterprise customers across industries adopt our category, AI‑moderated research, as the new standard for understanding people.



We’re a tight-knit team serving some of the world’s largest enterprises



As an SDR at Outset, you will be on the front lines of prospecting and driving new business opportunities. You’ll prospect, research, and engage with potential enterprise customers.

Responsibilities

 - Conduct high-volume outbound prospecting (calls, emails, social channels) to source leads.

 - Source qualified leads from industry conference lead lists, webinars, and other marketing activations.

 - Attend industry conferences to network and generate new business along with the rest of the GTM team.

 - Strategically identify and engage with decision-makers, tailoring outreach to address key business needs and pain points.

 - Collaborate closely with Enterprise Account Executives, ensuring seamless handoff of qualified leads.

 - Consistently meet or exceed monthly and quarterly pipeline generation targets.

 - Leverage CRM tools to track outreach activity, measure success, and identify areas for improvement.

 - Work cross-functionally with marketing, GTM, and product teams to refine messaging and share market feedback.

Qualifications

 - Excellent verbal and written communication skills; ability to engage and influence senior-level executives.

 - High degree of organization, accountability, and a results-oriented mindset.

 - Familiarity with CRM platforms and sales engagement tools (e.g., Salesforce, Sales Navigator, Outreach, or Apollo).

 - Self-starter approach and comfort operating in a dynamic startup environment.

 - Resourceful and persistent in every task they take on

 - Bonus: 1-2 years of experience as an SDR at a SaaS or AI company.

NOTE: This role may involve travel up to 20% of the time.

Benefits

 - Daily collaboration with founders, shaping the core product vision.

 - Exposure to and collaboration with design and research leaders at top global brands.

 - Competitive cash and equity compensation. Actual compensation packages are based on various factors unique to each candidate, including skill set, depth of experience, and certifications.

Outset is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees, free from discrimination based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability, or any other protected class.

source_jobs.title: Customer Operations Associate - NYC
source_jobs.description:
Outset invented a better way to do research: AI-powered user interviews.



Global brands like Hubspot, Microsoft, Uber and Nestle use Outset to achieve deeper, qualitative insights about their users at unprecedented speed and scale.


The research industry is massive (>$140B and growing) and ripe for disruption. Incumbents are outdated, slow, and burdened by high-cost services. That's our opportunity.


Outset is backed by top Silicon Valley investors and raised a $30M Series B in December 2025—less than six months after our Series A—led by Radical Ventures with participation from M12 (Microsoft’s venture arm), 8VC, Y Combinator, and Adverb Ventures.



The raise follows a breakout year, with our business growing 8x as enterprise customers across industries adopt our category, AI‑moderated research, as the new standard for understanding people.



We’re a tight-knit team serving some of the world’s largest enterprises



As a Customer Operations Associate, you’ll work closely with our Customer Success Managers and broader GTM and engineering teams to ensure our customers succeed in their research. You'll become our customers’ go-to partner, helping them navigate the platform, manage research logistics, and unlock the full value of our tools. This is a high-impact role with tons of room for ownership, learning, and growth.

Qualifications

 - Support customer research success by reviewing study content, assisting with participant recruitment, and providing hands-on research support

 - Act as a trusted product advisor, responding to questions, troubleshooting issues, and helping customers make the most of our platform

 - Collaborate with external partners (e.g., vendors assisting with study participant recruitment) to ensure smooth research execution

 - Contribute to product knowledge by building and maintaining help center content and improving internal documentation

 - Advocate for our users and inform our product roadmap by sharing customer insights and feedback with the Outset team

 - Develop process and systems to optimize our internal workflows, including incorporation of automation and AI

Qualifications

 - Experience in consulting, market research, research operations (including expert networks/ participant recruitment), social science research, or adjacent fields

 - 1-2+ years of experience successfully managing customer relationships (e.g., consulting, market research, project management, account management, etc.)

 - Excellent communication skills, with experience adapting communication to relevant audiences

 - A proactive, problem-solving mindset and a passion for helping customers succeed - when you see a problem that needs to be solved, you take ownership

 - Experience developing strong product expertise and/or technical expertise

 - Strong organizational skills and experience managing multiple priorities or workstreams in parallel



Benefits

 - Daily collaboration with founders, shaping the core product vision.

 - Exposure to and collaboration with design and research leaders at top global brands.

 - Competitive cash and equity compensation. Actual compensation packages are based on various factors unique to each candidate, including skill set, depth of experience, and certifications.

Outset is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees, free from discrimination based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability, or any other protected class.

source_jobs.title: Sales Director - Market Research & Insights
source_jobs.description:
Outset invented a better way to do research: AI-powered user interviews.



Global brands like Hubspot, Microsoft, Uber and Nestle use Outset to achieve deeper, qualitative insights about their users at unprecedented speed and scale.


The research industry is massive (>$140B and growing) and ripe for disruption. Incumbents are outdated, slow, and burdened by high-cost services. That's our opportunity.


Outset is backed by top Silicon Valley investors and raised a $30M Series B in December 2025—less than six months after our Series A—led by Radical Ventures with participation from M12 (Microsoft’s venture arm), 8VC, Y Combinator, and Adverb Ventures.



The raise follows a breakout year, with our business growing 8x as enterprise customers across industries adopt our category, AI‑moderated research, as the new standard for understanding people.



We’re a tight-knit team serving some of the world’s largest enterprises



We’re looking for a Sales Director, Market Research & Insights to help drive the next phase of growth at Outset.

This is a senior individual contributor role reporting to the VP of Sales, responsible for selling Outset into Market Research and Insights teams across enterprise organizations.

You’ll own the full sales cycle—from prospecting and pipeline development through closing and expansion—working with both net new customers and expansion within existing accounts. This role requires a deep understanding of the Market Research ecosystem and the ability to build trusted relationships with research and insights leaders.

You’ll partner closely with Marketing, Product, and Customer teams to bring Outset’s AI-moderated research platform to leading research organizations, helping them dramatically accelerate how they generate insights about their customers and users.




RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Own the full sales cycle for Market Research and Insights teams, from prospecting to close.

 - Build and manage a pipeline of opportunities with both net new logos and existing customers.

 - Develop strong relationships with Market Research and Insights leaders at enterprise organizations.

 - Lead discovery conversations and product demonstrations that connect Outset’s capabilities to customer research workflows.

 - Drive complex enterprise sales processes involving multiple stakeholders and decision makers.

 - Maintain accurate forecasting and pipeline visibility.

 - Partner with Marketing and outbound teams to develop targeted prospecting strategies into research organizations.

 - Collaborate closely with Customer Success and Research teams to ensure strong adoption and expansion opportunities post-sale.

 - Provide market feedback from research leaders to inform product development and go-to-market strategy.


QUALIFICATIONS

 - 5+ years of B2B SaaS sales experience, with a strong track record of exceeding quota.

 - 5+ years of experience in Market Research, or experience selling to Market Research or Insights teams.

 - Proven ability to run full-cycle enterprise sales, including prospecting, managing complex deal cycles, and closing new business.

 - Deep understanding of the Market Research ecosystem and how research teams operate.

 - Exceptional communication, executive presence, and relationship-building skills.

 - Ability to operate independently in a fast-paced startup environment.

 - Strong problem-solving and consultative selling skills.

 - Willingness to travel for customer meetings and industry events as needed.

Benefits

 - Daily collaboration with founders, shaping the core product vision.

 - Exposure to and collaboration with design and research leaders at top global brands.

 - Competitive cash and equity compensation. Actual compensation packages are based on various factors unique to each candidate, including skill set, depth of experience, and certifications.

Outset is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all emp

source_jobs.title: Brand Designer
source_jobs.description:
Outset invented a better way to do research: AI-powered user interviews.



Global brands like Hubspot, Microsoft, Uber and Nestle use Outset to achieve deeper, qualitative insights about their users at unprecedented speed and scale.


The research industry is massive (>$140B and growing) and ripe for disruption. Incumbents are outdated, slow, and burdened by high-cost services. That's our opportunity.


Outset is backed by top Silicon Valley investors and raised a $30M Series B in December 2025—less than six months after our Series A—led by Radical Ventures with participation from M12 (Microsoft’s venture arm), 8VC, Y Combinator, and Adverb Ventures.



The raise follows a breakout year, with our business growing 8x as enterprise customers across industries adopt our category, AI‑moderated research, as the new standard for understanding people.



We’re a tight-knit team serving some of the world’s largest enterprises



This role sits at the intersection of brand and marketing - you'll be the primary creative force behind how Outset shows up in the world, from paid campaigns to launch moments to the content our prospects see every day. You'll work closely with the marketing team day-to-day.

Responsibilities

 - Own visual design for marketing campaigns, landing pages, social content, email, and events

 - Be the day-to-day creative partner for the marketing team - turning briefs into polished, on-brand assets fast

 - Maintain and evolve the Outset brand system across all marketing touch points

 - Design pitch decks, sales collateral, and customer-facing materials

 - Collaborate with content and demand gen on creative direction for paid and organic channels

 - Support product launches and feature announcements with marketing creative

 - Contribute to the visual language of new product launches and feature announcements

 - Work with product design for cohesive brand vision across all touch points

Qualifications

 - 2–4 years of brand or graphic design experience, ideally with a strong marketing portfolio

 - Startup experience owning projects 0-1

 - Proven ability to move quickly and produce high-quality assets across digital, print, and social formats

 - Experience in Figma; building with AI tools

 - Experience in web development basics, with the assistance of AI tools (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.)

 - Proficiency in updating and maintaining marketing website infrastructure

 - Strong eye for typography, hierarchy, and layout — you sweat the details

 - Comfortable working in a fast-moving environment where priorities shift

 - Motion design or video editing (After Effects, Lottie)

 - Experience building or maintaining a brand/design system

Benefits

 - Daily collaboration with founders, shaping the core product vision.

 - Exposure to and collaboration with design and research leaders at top global brands.

 - Competitive cash and equity compensation. Actual compensation packages are based on various factors unique to each candidate, including skill set, depth of experience, and certifications.

Outset is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees, free from discrimination based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability, or any other protected class.

source_jobs.title: Research Strategy Lead - Pre Sales
source_jobs.description:
Outset invented a better way to do research: AI-powered user interviews.



Global brands like Hubspot, Microsoft, Uber and Nestle use Outset to achieve deeper, qualitative insights about their users at unprecedented speed and scale.


The research industry is massive (>$140B and growing) and ripe for disruption. Incumbents are outdated, slow, and burdened by high-cost services. That's our opportunity.


Outset is backed by top Silicon Valley investors and raised a $30M Series B in December 2025—less than six months after our Series A—led by Radical Ventures with participation from M12 (Microsoft’s venture arm), 8VC, Y Combinator, and Adverb Ventures.



The raise follows a breakout year, with our business growing 8x as enterprise customers across industries adopt our category, AI‑moderated research, as the new standard for understanding people.



We’re a tight-knit team serving some of the world’s largest enterprises



Market research buyers care about insight quality, methodological rigor, and the credibility of who’s delivering it. Winning VP-level insights leaders at CPG, healthcare, and financial services firms takes someone who has sat on their side of the table.

As a Research Strategy Lead, you’re the research authority in our most important deals. You join early conversations with research-native buyers, lead the methodological discussion, and help them picture what their practice looks like with Outset and AI moderation. You’re the human credibility layer that earns the technology the right to be evaluated on its merits.

Responsibilities

 - Partner with Account Executives in early-stage meetings as the research expert, leading the methodology conversation and building trust with senior insights buyers.

 - Run demos and discovery that show, credibly, how rigorous research gets done with AI moderation — and where Outset fits a buyer’s real workflow.

 - Scope and shepherd pilots from kickoff to delivery, owning output quality to a standard that holds up in front of the buyer’s stakeholders.

 - Tell the “future research state” story in a way that resonates with practitioners, not just procurement.

 - Support proposals and RFP responses where methodological credibility is the deciding factor.

 - Carry the voice of the research buyer back to product, sales, and marketing — and help the team speak more credibly to this audience.

Qualifications

 - 10+ years in market research or UX research, with hands-on methodological depth — you’ve personally designed, moderated, and delivered studies.

 - Credible in front of senior insights leaders at large CPG, financial services, or healthcare organizations.

 - Experience in a solutions, pre-sales, client services, or senior practitioner role at a research technology company or agency.

 - A strong storyteller who is equally fluent in research language and business language.

 - Comfortable scoping work, managing timelines, and holding quality under pressure.

 - Energized by ambiguity and building in a startup environment, with an active network in the insights community.

Bonus

 - Time on the brand or client side as a researcher or insights leader.

 - Experience evaluating or introducing a research platform from either side of the table.

 - Familiarity with AI-moderated research or emerging qualitative methods.

Benefits

 - Daily collaboration with founders, shaping the core product vision.

 - Exposure to and collaboration with design and research leaders at top global brands.

 - Competitive cash and equity compensation. Actual compensation packages are based on various factors unique to each candidate, including skill set, depth of experience, and certifications.

Outset is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees, free from discrimination based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability, or any other pro

source_jobs.title: Account Director - NYC
source_jobs.description:
Outset invented a better way to do research: AI-powered user interviews.



Global brands like Hubspot, Microsoft, Uber and Nestle use Outset to achieve deeper, qualitative insights about their users at unprecedented speed and scale.


The research industry is massive (>$140B and growing) and ripe for disruption. Incumbents are outdated, slow, and burdened by high-cost services. That's our opportunity.


Outset is backed by top Silicon Valley investors and raised a $30M Series B in December 2025—less than six months after our Series A—led by Radical Ventures with participation from M12 (Microsoft’s venture arm), 8VC, Y Combinator, and Adverb Ventures.



The raise follows a breakout year, with our business growing 8x as enterprise customers across industries adopt our category, AI‑moderated research, as the new standard for understanding people.



We’re a tight-knit team serving some of the world’s largest enterprises



As an Account Director, you’ll own relationships with some of our most strategic enterprise and mid-market customers. You’ll act as a trusted advisor, ensuring they achieve maximum value from our platform while identifying new opportunities for growth and partnership. You’ll collaborate closely with Product, Sales, and Marketing to influence roadmap priorities and expand our footprint within key accounts.

Responsibilities:

 - Serve as a strategic partner to executive stakeholders, guiding customers through adoption, expansion, and long-term success.

 - Own commercial health across a portfolio of high-value accounts, driving renewals, upsells, and advocacy

 - Develop account plans and success frameworks that align with customer business objectives.

 - Partner with Sales to identify and close revenue expansion opportunities within existing accounts.

 - Translate customer feedback into actionable input for Product and Engineering.

 - Forecast retention and growth metrics, providing visibility into customer health and pipeline.

Qualifications

 - 5–10+ years of customer success, account management, or consulting experience, with 2+ years managing strategic/enterprise accounts.

 - Ability to travel 25% of the time for customer events, customer visits, and conferences.

 - Proven success in driving renewals, expansions, and multi-threaded stakeholder relationships.

 - Experience in a fast-paced SaaS or Series A/B startup environment.

 - Exceptional communication, executive presence, and relationship-building skills.

 - Strong analytical mindset with ability to tell a story with data.

 - Ability to work cross-functionally and thrive in ambiguity.

 - A proactive, ownership-driven mindset—comfortable balancing strategic and hands-on work.

Benefits

 - Daily collaboration with founders, shaping the core product vision.

 - Exposure to and collaboration with design and research leaders at top global brands.

 - Competitive cash and equity compensation. Actual compensation packages are based on various factors unique to each candidate, including skill set, depth of experience, and certifications.

Outset is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees, free from discrimination based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability, or any other protected class.

notes: Outset is a research industry disruptor with a strong sales focus.
